package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceReturnsPreformattedClientMessage() string {
    ruleID := "service_returns_preformatted_client_message"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that return final client-facing message strings instead of typed domain errors."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
